title: Wander: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Wander handles flights, stays and day plans in one tidy itinerary, so you can travel light and stay present.
Stop juggling tabs and screenshots. Wander keeps the entire journey from dream to departure together.
cards: Day-by-day plans that adapt to your pace, weather and mood.
Local stays and hidden corners, not the same tired tourist list.
Invite friends, vote on plans and split the costs without the spreadsheet.
Lock in dates with free changes, because plans love to wander too.
Trip protection and 24/7 help, from delayed flights to lost bags.
Suggestions from people who actually live where you are going.

sections.text: Tell us where and when, and Wander drafts a route with stays, transfers and daily ideas you can reshape in a tap.
Tickets, maps and confirmations stay in one pocket, ready even when the signal is not. No more frantic inbox digging.
bullets: Reminders that respect your time zone

sections.sub: No travel agent visit, no endless tabs.
steps: Pick a place or let Wander surprise you with a match.
Tweak the draft itinerary until it feels like yours.
Confirm everything at once and hit the road.

sections.quote: We planned two weeks across the coast in one evening with Wander. Everything just worked, and we actually relaxed for once.
sections.author: Sample Traveler

sections.sub: Start free. Upgrade when the trips get bigger.

items: Is there really a free plan?
Yes. The Explorer plan is free forever for up to three trips, no card required.
Can Wander book my flights and stays?
You can book stays, transfers and activities in-app, with flight search rolling out by region.
Voyager and Globetrotter include flexible dates, so you can reshuffle without the panic.
Do the maps work without internet?
Yes. Paid plans download maps, tickets and confirmations for offline use.
Globetrotter adds trip protection and 24/7 help for delays, cancellations and lost bags.

sections.sub: Join thousands of travelers who swapped the planning headache for one clear itinerary.

sections.tagline: One tidy place for flights, stays and day plans. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Wander is a sample template with dummy content
